title: CDD alert guidance: Client is PEP (WiP - not in use)
body_markdown:
**Alert description:** Client is PEP (Political exposure person) = 200 risk scoring.

(WiP - not in use) - superseded by 12003442859 CDD alert guidance: Client is PEP in OTS.

Procedures: Review client's Back Office and Salesforce profile. Two outcomes:
1. PEP status known - review True Match Assurance register for EDD confirmation.
2. PEP status not known - open-source search, "pending review" status, false-positive close-out.
